scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run dev -w frontend" "bun run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: cd frontend && bun run build && cd ../backend && bun run build && cd ..
scripts.i: cd frontend && bun i && cd ../backend && bun i && cd ..
scripts.typecheck: cd frontend && bun run typecheck && cd ../backend && bun run typecheck && cd ..
